content.en:
In a blink of an eye.

Ye Tian saw two more familiar figures on one of the fighting platforms.

And these two are none other than the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master from the Heavenly Emperor Palace!

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master are both Returning to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and the opponents they accept to challenge are also Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors!

Like Jinchen Dao Ancestor, the challenges they accepted were all challenges rewarded with 50 points, and it seemed that these two people were also like Jin Chen Dao Ancestors, and they wanted to try the strength of other Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestors first.

The result was obvious, they also lost the battle.

Most of the half-step domain ancestors in the Battle Realm Tower came from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and only a few half-step domain ancestors came from one realm after another.

And those realms are all very powerful, even stronger than the Divine Heaven Realm, with a large number of domain ancestors, the cultivation civilization is very prosperous, and even has a connection with the depths of the dark forbidden realm.

Moreover, their War Boundary Tower projection was not born naturally, but was a War Boundary Tower projection sub-tower that was traded by the Supreme Domain Ancestor into the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

The Battle Realm Tower from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is a very rare naturally born projection Battle Realm Tower.

I have to say that this is the luck of the Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm.

Even in the future, if the half-step domain ancestor of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm exchanges with the half-step domain ancestor in the depths of the dark forbidden realm, he can obtain a lot of benefits.

The Battle Realm Tower is a channel for the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm to understand a higher level!

If you can get a lot of points in the Battle Realm Tower, then for Ye Tian, it can be said to be the biggest opportunity that he can encounter now!

At the right time.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, as well as the Jinchen Dao Ancestor, all came to Ye Tian's front.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

The three Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors all greeted Ye Tian one after another.

"How did the three of you get on the fighting platform?"

Ye Tian's gaze swept across the faces of the three of them, and the faces of the three of them were not angry and angry.

After a moment of silence, someone finally spoke.

"Don't mention it, the three of us have lost too badly! The strength of these half-step domain ancestors from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm is really terrifying, we are not their opponents at all, it can be said that when facing them, we have no power to fight back. "

Although it is embarrassing to admit that his strength is poor, it is even more embarrassing to be beaten on the fighting table without the strength to fight back.

"Not only that, those Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm are too arrogant, and they are too contemptuous of our Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors from the Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm, it can be said that they directly step on us as dust!

Jin Chen Daozu's expression was angry, and his eyes were full of anger.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, among our Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, among the half-step domain ancestors who came to the Battle Realm Tower, only you and the Wind Mountain Lord have the highest strength at present, and the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord is unwilling to make a move, so please take a shot to compete with the half-step domain ancestor in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and also correct the name of our Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, I wonder if you are willing to give it a try?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said.

Although there was a contradiction between their Heavenly Emperor Palace and Ye Tian, at this moment they could only encourage Ye Tian to play. If Ye Tian wins, he can justify the name of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, if Ye Tian loses, the worst result will be the same as them, and Ye Tian naturally can't sneer at them because of the things in the Battle Realm Tower.

However, they didn't think that Ye Tian would lose easily, after all, Ye Tian's strength was too terrifying, and now he was afraid that he was even stronger than the top Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestor.

They weren't sure that there would be no half-step realm ancestor like Ye Tian in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, but even if there were, it couldn't be many.

Because, the possibility of Ye Tian losing is very small.

However, now that a lot of time had passed, they also wanted to know if Ye Tian's strength had improved again.

In the last battle, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master could be said to hate Ye Tian to the core! They had held themselves for tens of millions of years, and their strength had gone further, but they still didn't dare to have any thoughts of doing anything to Ye Tian.

But in the past tens of millions of years, they have not seen Ye Tian make a move, and they don't know what kind of situation Ye Tian's strength has reached!

You must know that in the last battle, Ye Tian's cultivation was just an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, so he could force the two of them back and save Ouyang Jiu'er!

Now, Ye Tian's cultivation has broken through to the realm of all things! How can this not make the two of them frightened?

Although the idea of revenge was disappearing, it did not prevent them from observing Ye Tian's current cultivation and strength.

Anyway, as long as Ye Tian makes a move, whether he wins or loses, it will not be harmful to them.

That being the case, of course they were willing to encourage Ye Tian to make a move!

Hearing this, the Eternal Dao Ancestor who was looking for a suitable opponent to challenge himself on the battle list also looked over, looking at Ye Tian expectantly, and also hoped that Ye Tian would be able to make a move.

After all, several of them lost too badly in the fighting platform!

At this time, someone needs to find a trace of face for them, and for the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!

And the Eternal Dao Ancestor was quite confident in Ye Tian's combat power!

"Since you've all asked me to do it, it's okay for me to give it a try!"

Ye Tian agreed to come down under the gaze of several people.

And his eyes were looking at the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord who was watching the battle around the Dou Zhan Tai, and the Feng Mountain Mountain Lord looked at the Dou Zhan Tai with hot eyes, looking like he was trying his best to endure and didn't want to make a move.

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain is just a clone, looking at his appearance, even if he enters the Battle Realm Tower, he will not make a move.

After all, once you make a move, it is difficult to recover.

Moreover, once a doppelganger falls, the War Tower may not condense the body for him.

Hearing that Ye Tian agreed, Jinchen Dao Ancestor and the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the others immediately cheered up.

Ye Tian's cultivation at this time is the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and he is currently matching the opponent, and the Battle Realm Tower will only give him the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm who matches his fellow practitioners.

Ye Tian glanced at the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor who was rewarded with 100 points, and directly asked the Battle Realm Tower to match him with an opponent at will!

Regarding Ye Tian's behavior, no one from Jinchen Daozu and the others had any objections.

After all, strength is everything!

Ye Tian is very confident in his own strength!

In a blink of an eye!

The Battle Realm Tower had already matched Ye Tian with an opponent!And the other party also agreed to Ye Tian's challenge! The other party also happened to be a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm!

Seeing that the other party had already entered the fighting platform, Ye Tian also stepped into the fighting platform!
